name: simplified-ai
description: Operate Simplified and run marketer-grade content workflows from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Simplified for AI combines platform operator skills with marketer workflows through the hosted Simplified MCP connector. Manage brand context and marketing projects, generate reusable image and video assets, plan evergreen and local content, build cross-platform campaigns, run disciplined creative tests, prepare stakeholder reviews, publish safely, and turn social analytics into next actions.
defaultPrompt: Plan a month of content for my connected channels.
Turn this launch brief into a cross-platform campaign.
Review social performance and recommend what to do next.
